title: Enrich preview contract for multi-step flow scenarios
summary: Extend the native preview contract so review and proposal surfaces can describe multi-step modal, stack, and breadcrumb flow context more truthfully without pretending to execute a runtime navigation graph.
acceptance_criteria: Preview contract can express richer breadcrumb, modal, and stack progression context than the current single summary row.
Review and proposal preview configurations derive the richer flow context from existing exported navigation truth and proposal metadata.
Preview UI and contract inspector explain what remains contract-driven versus exact runtime truth.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Native preview contract now carries explicit breadcrumb trails, flow step progression, modal depth, and contract-note context instead of collapsing everything into a single summary row.

Review navigation and proposal apply preview both derive the richer flow context from existing navigation graph and proposal metadata, while keeping the new contract note explicit about what remains inferred.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the preview contract slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0023: enrich preview contract for multi-step modal, stack, and breadcrumb scenarios.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the model explicit and contract-driven instead of hardcoding more preview chrome heuristics.
Prefer truthful labels such as likely path, step count, and layered modal context when runtime certainty is missing.
